b:Tdfe5,<div class="specification">
<p>Blood pressure changes in chimpanzees (<em>Pan troglodytes</em>) fed a salt-supplemented diet during a two-and-a-half-year treatment period were compared to the blood pressure of those fed a normal diet. The graph shows the mean systolic and diastolic blood pressure (± standard deviation) before, during and after the treatment period.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p style="text-align: center;">[Source: Republished with permission of American Society for Clinical<br/>Investigation, from <em>The Journal of Clinical Investigation</em>, O’Shaughnessy, K.M. and Karet, F.E., 113, 8, 2004;<br/>permission conveyed through Copyright Clearance Center, Inc.]</p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Evaluate the effect of salt on blood pressure using the data in the graph.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>State the instrument used by doctors to measure blood pressure.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Describe the mechanism by which the heartbeat is initiated.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>c:T444,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. systolic pressure increases with salt in diet during treatment;</p>
<p>b. diastolic pressure is slightly higher/no change with salt during treatment<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>diastolic pressure only changes towards the end of the period;</p>
<p>c. (blood) pressure goes back to normal after treatment<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>salt causes increased (blood) pressure;</p>
<p>d. standard deviation values overlap therefore not statistically significant;</p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>sphygmomanometer/blood pressure <span style="text-decoration: underline;">monitor</span>;</p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. sinoatrial node/SAN initiates contraction of atria;</p>
<p>b. SAN sends messages to the atrioventricular/AV node;</p>
<p>c. AV node initiates ventricular contraction;</p>
<p>d. through conducting fibres;</p>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/biology/topic/d/","children":["← back to ","Biology"," topic ","d"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"20N.3.HL.TZ0.22"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Biology"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"HL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","3"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"20N"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","d-4-the-heart"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$c"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n<p>The majority could evaluate that salt increased blood pressure, most comparing the effect on systolic and diastolic blood pressure.</p>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n<p>Although strong candidates could state sphygmomanometer or blood pressure monitor, too many irrelevant or blank answers were seen.</p>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n<p>Most candidates did well in this question, strongest candidates distinguishing themselves by complete and very detailed answers.</p>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">c.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
